title: Raw-Friendly Algerian Paws Tagine
description: A comforting, rich Algerian dish featuring cheese-pull and raw frozen prawns, cooked in a ttukbaegi earthenware pot.
instructions: Preheat the ttukbaegi earthenware pot over medium heat.
Sear the chopped onion in olive oil until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the raw frozen prawns, Algerian spice blend, and beef broth. Stir to combine.
Transfer the ttukbaegi pot to the oven and cook at 375°F for 10-12 minutes, or until the prawns are pink and cooked through.
Remove the pot from the oven and sprinkle shredded Gruyère cheese on top.
Return the pot to the oven and broil for 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
Let the dish rest for 2-3 minutes before serving to allow the cheese to set.
Slice the Tagine into portions and serve.
Garnish individual portions with additional parsley if desired.
